description: Perimeter placement radii BEFORE clamping against envelope inner lateral. Values are computed analytically from template constants (AIRFIELD_TEMPLATES in src/systems/world/AirfieldTemplates.ts) and the envelope stamp formula in TerrainFeatureCompiler.buildAirfieldEnvelopeStamp.

us_airbase.note: us_airbase perimeter (240 m) was already inside innerLateral (289 m); no drift here, but the clamp keeps it stable if template dimensions evolve.

forward_strip.note: Perimeter radius 160 m exceeds innerLateral 140 m by 20 m, landing perimeter structures on the 6 m hard ramp + 48 m graded shoulder. Foundations float / sink.
